description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named bazel that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, and on merge groups to main. The workflow has two ubuntu-latest jobs: format_bazel_files checks and formats Bazel files, while build_direct and build_indirect jobs build p4c directly and indirectly with Bazel, respectively. Both build jobs depend on the format_bazel_files job and use a Bazel cache.
